external_runtime_dependencies.name: Chart.js
external_runtime_dependencies.rationale: Keeps initial paint (Daily tab) free of Chart.js overhead; only loaded if user opens Trends.

external_runtime_dependencies.name: MLB Team Logos CDN
external_runtime_dependencies.trigger: init() after fetchTeams resolves; individual for below-the-fold instances
external_runtime_dependencies.rationale: rev-2 — official MLB SVG team logos used inline (Daily standings + trends + upcoming) and as Chart.js pointStyle on the three scatter charts. CORS: Allow-Origin *, verified. Cache: 14-day TTL on edge. Avg payload 1–2 KB per logo.

notes.trends_view_added: rev-1 adds a Trends tab with 7 widgets (KPI strip, sortable standings, last-10 leaderboard, RS-vs-RA bubble scatter, OPS-vs-ERA scatter, home/road grouped bar, power/discipline scatter, 14-day W/L heatmap). All widgets driven by live fetches via data-client.js + stats-client.js; no inlined data. Daily tab behavior unchanged.
notes.logos_added: rev-2 integrates MLB CDN team logos across Daily and Trends tabs (9+ surfaces: rankings rows, sparkline rows, upcoming-game chips, KPI cards, standings table, last-10 leaderboard, three scatter point markers, home/road logo strip, heatmap rows). New logo-helpers.js module owns preload + cached HTMLImageElement supply. teams.js gains getLogoUrl(id, variant) and refreshed primary colors for ARI / DET / NYY to match the actual CDN logo extraction. Existing color swatches replaced with logos throughout.
notes.divergence: final/ diverges from integration/ — see divergence-from-integration.json.
